_comment: Feature flags for the 2026-04-19 sprint. Every key defaults to false in backend/feature_flags.py. Flip a value to true here to enable the feature in the running deployment. Unknown keys are ignored with a console warning.
_comment_onboarding: Onboarding redesign (docs/plans/onboarding-conversion/plan.md v2.1). onboarding.v2 is the master kill-switch: a feature is live iff onboarding.v2 AND its own flag. All ship dark. analytics.client_events sits OUTSIDE the master — it starts the pre-redesign baseline capture and should be flipped true first. LAUNCH PAIRING: flip landing.try_before_sync together with onboarding.landing — the backend demo endpoint (/api/session/demo) 404s without it and the landing's Sleeper-down escape + demo link depend on it.
_comment_monetization: Monetization platform (docs/plans/monetization/00-platform-foundation.md). One flag per strategy, ALL dark until operator green-light. Rollout order: monetize.entitlements first (observe mode - logs, never blocks), then monetize.founder + monetize.paywall for the TestFlight window, monetize.pro + monetize.season_pass at launch, growth.* after, ads last. Rankings marketplace flags (ranks.*, marketplace.*) follow their plan's season-aligned phases.
_comment_teardown: 2026-07-19 app-teardown remediation (branch teardown-remediation; PRDs in gitignored app-teardown-review/). ALL dark until operator review. Exceptions shipped unflagged by design: the league-prefs authz fix (security), doc/legal-copy corrections, and inert accessibility annotations (labels/roles/traits). Flag-per-behavior below; rollout notes live in each PRD.
_comment_testing: QA/testing surfaces. testing.stage_users gates the synthetic stage-user spawner (POST/DELETE /api/test-users, backend/test_users.py) used to QA the onboarding flow with qa_* users at preset adoption stages. Requests must ALSO come from a tester-allowlist device/user (config/tester_allowlist.json or FTF_TESTER_ALLOWLIST), so flipping this on never exposes the surface to real users. Default false; flip only during onboarding QA windows.
